title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Federal Bank

jsonLd.title: Vacancy for Financial Analyst at Federal Bank
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Federal Bank! We are hiring a Financial Analyst for our Gurgaon team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Federal Bank:
Federal Bank is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Budgeting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Federal Bank!
